calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-21-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brian Fearnow for Petitioner.

Mr. Fearnow made reference to the Examiner's notes with respect to the Petitioner's failure to disclose details as to the number of shares sold/purchased, stated that there are three beneficiaries, that the Executor is the primary beneficiary, that all of the beneficiaries are aware and are not objecting, and that all of the assets are in two accounts. The Petition for Final Distribution on Waiver of Detailed Accounting, etc. is taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
